title: Service-Gap-Aware OMN-PF Scheduling for Dynamic ADT-OFDMA Strict-FFR LiFi Attocell Networks
description: Reproducible Python simulator, experiment runner, multi-seed results, and figure generator for the mobility-, receiver-orientation-, NLOS-, beam-transition-, and service-gap-aware OMN-PF extension of the ADT-OFDMA strict-FFR LiFi attocell benchmark.
